document.name: Bocksay Bistro
document.shortDescription: Wine bistro on Wesselényi utca — Bock wines, tapas, and cozy brick dining near the party streets.
document.longDescription:
Bocksay Bistro pairs the Bock winery portfolio with small plates on Wesselényi utca between Kazinczy and the boulevard. Indoor tables and a short menu suit pre-concert dinners. See bocksay.hu.

Sources: https://www.bocksay.hu/
